title: Ubiquiti sector antenna AirMax MIMO 13dBi 900MHz, 120 °, rocket kit
description: AM-9M13-120 airMAX Sector Antenna is a 13dBi Carrier Class 2x2 MIMO (Dual Polarity) Sector Antenna with 120 ° beam angle that was designed for 900MHz band and for integrate with RocketM radios (RocketM sold separately). 900MHz band is better than higher frequency bands in Non-Line-of-Sight (NLOS) applications. Every airMAX ® Antenna has a built-in Rocketâ¢ mount , so no tools are needed to install the Rocket BaseStation. Package contains Antenna (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws Antenna (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 1,5 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 30 Wireless frequency 900 MHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 120 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 109 Antenna gain [dBi] 13 Connectors and Interfaces Rocket kit Yes RF connectors (2) RSMA female
